intents.question: What are your pricing plans?
intents.answer: We offer Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans tailored to different team sizes and needs. Share your use case and we will recommend the best fit.

intents.question: What can this AI chatbot do?
intents.answer: Our website assistant can greet visitors, answer common questions, qualify opportunities, and smoothly hand conversations to your team when a human touch is needed. It captures clean lead details directly inside the chat and keeps the experience fast, on-brand, and always available.

intents.question: Can I see a live demo?
intents.answer: Absolutely. Share your name and email and we will reach out within one business day to schedule a live demo.

fallback: I am not sure about that. Let me connect you to our team.
greeting: Hi there! How can I help you today?
